name: Certified Funding
description_short: Certified Funding specializes exclusively in second lien mortgages, home equity loans, and construction financing for mortgage brokers and bankers since 1985.
description_long:
Certified Funding, L.P. has operated as a second lien lending specialist for nearly 40 years, established in 1985. The company positions itself as a pioneer in the second lien market, serving mortgage brokers and mortgage bankers rather than consumers directly. As an independently owned and operated lender based in Dallas, Texas, they have built their business around deep expertise in a single lending niche.

The company offers purchase money second liens, equity liens, home improvement loans, and construction/permanent loans with escrow holdbacks. They advertise niche capabilities including jumbo second liens, loans to first-time homebuyers, products for borrowers with credit scores below 700, and balloon second lien options (where legally permitted). Their service area includes Texas and Colorado according to their website navigation.

Certified Funding distinguishes itself through specialization: second liens are explicitly their only business. They emphasize reliable closing timelines, an experienced staff, and competitive products tailored to broker needs. Their marketing emphasizes flexibility on credit scores and LTV ratios (up to 95% CLTV for home improvement loans in major metropolitan areas), suggesting willingness to work with higher-risk borrowers compared to traditional lenders.

As a B2B lender serving brokers rather than direct consumers, Certified Funding's accessibility to individual borrowers is limited. Their website lacks pricing transparency, application processes, or consumer-focused educational content. They hold NMLS #1892899 and a Texas OCCC license, indicating state regulatory compliance. The company's long operational history and regulatory status suggest legitimacy, though their narrow focus means they cannot serve borrowers seeking primary mortgages or loans outside their specific second lien products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specialized expertise: Second liens are their exclusive business, not a side offering
Flexible credit criteria: Willing to make loans to borrowers with sub-700 credit scores
High LTV options: Up to 95% CLTV for home improvement second liens in major metros
First-time homebuyer programs: Offer second lien options for FTHBs
Construction loan capability: Can make seconds on construction/permanent loans with escrow holdbacks
Jumbo second lien products: Serve high-balance second mortgage market
B2B efficiency: Established relationships with mortgage professionals for streamlined processing
cons: B2B only: Does not work directly with consumers; must go through a mortgage broker or banker
No pricing transparency: Website contains no APR, rate, fee, or cost information
Limited geographic reach: Only explicitly serve Texas and Colorado
No online application: Requires phone contact and broker relationships to access products
Second liens only: Cannot provide primary mortgages or refinances on first liens
best_for: Mortgage brokers and bankers seeking reliable second lien funding for their clients
Borrowers with credit challenges who need a second mortgage to complete a home purchase
First-time homebuyers needing secondary financing to cover down payment or costs
Homeowners wanting home improvement financing through an experienced broker partner
diagnosis: Certified Funding is designed exclusively for mortgage professionals, not direct consumer lending. Borrowers cannot apply directly but must work through a mortgage broker or banker who has an established relationship with the company. The company's strength is specialized second lien expertise and flexible underwriting for borrowers with credit or loan structure challenges.
services: Construction/permanent loans with escrow holdback options
Products for borrowers with credit scores below 700
Balloon second lien options (where legally permitted)
Up to 95% CLTV home improvement loans in major metropolitan areas
Niche loan products for mortgage professionals
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
